body:
Good news and bad news
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1182%2E150750%2EAG9b8J)

Friends -
Earlier today, Joe Biden released his first day fundraising numbers:
**The good news** : we had a lot more individual donations than him on day one. A lot.
**The bad news** : when their campaign got done counting the checks from a $700,000 fundraiser hosted at the home of a telecommunications lobbyist, he out-raised us by just a little bit.
That’s fine, there is a limit to how many max checks one can collect. Our advantage is the sheer number of people who support our campaign and are willing to chip in to help us win.
Today’s an important day to exercise that advantage. Especially in light of this news. So we’re asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign? Today is an important day to answer the call.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190426-3-15&t=26&akid=1182%2E150750%2EAG9b8J)
Our strength has always been the number of people who support our campaign. Not the size of the checks they can afford to write.
All my best,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/10584?refcode=em190426-3-15&t=27&akid=1182%2E150750%2EAG9b8J)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1182%2E150750%2EAG9b8J). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1182%2E150750%2EAG9b8J). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1182_150750_AG9b8J&akid=1182%2E150750%2EAG9b8J).

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Tennessee's Vengeful Lawmakers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
#
Dear Peter, We're closing in on the last days of the 2019 state legislative session and, as you'll see as you make your way through this email update, there is a lot going on. First, though, please join us in thanking Juanita Charles, stellar Democratic candidate, for giving her all in her run for the special election in state senate District 22. Junaita and her team ran a strong and well-fought race. Thank you as well to the hundreds of volunteers in the District and throughout Tennessee who joined the fight and worked so hard on her behalf. Although we didn't get the result we wanted, Juanita stood up for Democratic values: fighting to protect our public schools and teachers, families without access to affordable healthcare, and men and women who work hard every day but don't earn a living wage. Juanita is a shining reflection of Democratic values, and we are thankful and proud that she chose to run. Please take a minute to send an encouraging "THANK YOU" email to Juanita to [juanita@charlesforsenate.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/wA-3Cv6lAQEXyXmCR5E7wjx3p6pFVZlSYQu-lfPiqxY=/OtKLflkf1dLpSMd-dADXnnYHb-NyiZ9LuXzcwKbqbJI=?subject=Thank%20you). **TENNESSEE 'S VENGEFUL LAWMAKERS** "[Tennessee's Vengeful Lawmakers](https://act.myngp.com/el/wA-3Cv6lAQEXyXmCR5E7wjx3p6pFVZlSYQu-lfPiqxY=/yVVyMb-p-ahRk3-rFvcx-hji7N8jkqCoIRVGJykE3HA=)" is a perfect headline for "Tennessee Republican's clear attack on the successful efforts to mobilize black voters during the 2018 midterm elections." But the attack on voter registration efforts is not the only reason the Republican-controlled Tennessee State Legislature continues to make national news. Even [George Takei](https://act.myngp.com/el/wA-3Cv6lAQEXyXmCR5E7wjx3p6pFVZlSYQu-lfPiqxY=/pv0n487ZyIc9CTDp6bWDk5S-9K3IDvgNmH6H2Hi4TDQ=) can't believe what he's hearing and so he's helping to shine some light on what's happening here. Thank you, Mr. Takei! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wA-3Cv6lAQEXyXmCR5E7wjx3p6pFVZlSYQu-lfPiqxY=/mSCTD_Z3h2ib3QFaG4SE7uXKcXrvuxW_iEHjsUU8ZiQ=) **DEMOCRATS WORKING HARD IN TENNESSEE**
Democrats and our allies are working hard everyday in Washington and Nashville to hold Republican's accountable and create an effective government for you and your family. Here's how: **PUBLIC EDUCATION** Two of the most devastating moves by Republicans this week will weaken public schools and further weaken those already in crisis. **Removing Local Control from Local School Boards:** First, despite opposition from the Tennessee Teachers Association, Speaker Glen Casada and Lt. Governor Randy McNally passed legislation in the Tennessee House and Senate last week that would strip away the ability of local school boards to approve new charter schools, putting that power in the hands of Gov. Bill Lee's administration instead. **Vouchers + NIMBY:** Also this week, both the Tennessee House and Senate passed legislation to implement a private school voucher program that ONLY applies to Shelby and Davidson County. In fact, Republican Rep. Jason Zachary from Knox County switched his vote from no to yes only because he was promised that vouchers would not apply to his home county. To Zachary (and other Republicans who voted for vouchers as long as they don't apply to their districts), children are commodities and as long as the children in Knox county get a good public school education, to h**k with everybody else. **Vouchers + Promised Pork:** The Tennesseans reported that "[Two Republican lawmakers who voted against Gov. Bill Lee's controversial school voucher bill said they were offered incentives to change their minds and vote in favor of the legislation](https://act.myngp.com/el/wA-3Cv6lAQEXyXmCR5E7wjx3p6pFVZlSYQu-lfPiqxY=/5NVTeODNLqHTcVmsyrS5hO7smUgQoN83B35QrMv_5MY=)." In other words, Republicans threw public school students and teachers under the bus for a potential photo op. Public schools will suffer for decades because of their blind ambition. Vouchers have not succeeded in any other state. To have them in Tennessee is a travesty and illustrates that Republicans are willing to abandon the absolute duty our government has to ensure a high-quality public education for every child in Tennessee. Both chambers will have to vote on vouchers again as there are still major differences between versions in Senate and House. **Vouchers + A Record-breaking Broken Campaign Promise:** Less than 24 hours after he was elected to the state senate on a platform that included his opposition to vouchers, and only three hours after he was sworn in, Republican Sen. Bill Powers voted FOR vouchers. Quick broken campaign promise or quickest broken campaign promise? **Vouchers + Democrats Standing Up for Public Education:** Watch this [video compilation of elected Tennessee Democrats](https://act.myngp.com/el/wA-3Cv6lAQEXyXmCR5E7wjx3p6pFVZlSYQu-lfPiqxY=/DpKp7x54fVp8tSxF12uSUp4UFu53eGjwNmJLdF4oB0U=?v=404110877076134) standing tall for our public school students & teachers and against vouchers. Please share and help us say **" THANK YOU"** to House Democratic Leader Karen Camper and Senate Democratic Leader Jeff Yarbro and ALL the members of the Senate Dems and House Dems. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wA-3Cv6lAQEXyXmCR5E7wjx3p6pFVZlSYQu-lfPiqxY=/epNiadpm8NvwaPkWs6eU-2Bl3said5V7F6N749fmdHA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wA-3Cv6lAQEXyXmCR5E7wjx3p6pFVZlSYQu-lfPiqxY=/dHzM6t31K6jwG62UiMftu1UNuSje9gnFZ-my7jWIAF8=) **VOTING RIGHTS** Yesterday, Republicans pushed Tennessee one step closer to enacting one of the most aggressive voter suppression laws in the nation. If Gov. Bill Lee signs HB 1079/SB 971, Tennessee will be the only state to impose criminal penalties against voter registration groups. It is incomprehensible that a state that sits near the very bottom in voter turnout would take such a drastic measure to cripple and intimate groups like [The Equity Alliance](https://act.myngp.com/el/wA-3Cv6lAQEXyXmCR5E7wjx3p6pFVZlSYQu-lfPiqxY=/4Z6rSsPEMX43tHdjDHlBiGNkWwOrfnQD7MUXfxO7yTY=), whose work directly strengthens our Democracy by helping other citizens register to vote. How do Republicans expect grassroots organization to survive after being subjected to $10,000 fines for minor deficiencies such as failing to mark the Mr./Mrs./Ms box in registration forms? The answer is, they don't. name: Team Ed Markey
subject: Ring! Ring!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
|
---
[]()

| | | Team - Ed is fed up with the scourge of robocalls flooding American's homes day in and day out. That's why he introduced the TRACED Act to help trace, catch, and prosecute scammers.

_**[Will you join Ed and become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the TRACED Act today and show Congress that the American people want an end to robocall scammers?](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/citizen-co-sponsor-traced-act-pros?source=042719&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/citizen-co-sponsor-traced-act-pros?source=042719&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *
Team,

Are you getting tons of robocalls? Even dozens a day? Are some coming from overseas or from numbers that look an awful lot like your phone number?

It seems no one is immune from the scourge of pre-recorded robocalls trying to scam you out of your money. And the calls seem to never stop coming.

Robocalls have become an epidemic that must be stopped.

That's why I introduced the TRACED Act, a bill that l will give authorities the ability to find, catch, and prosecute scammers.

_**[If you're as sick of the robocalls as I am, then I need you to add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the TRACED Act and help stop robocall scammers.](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/citizen-co-sponsor-traced-act-pros?source=042719&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/citizen-co-sponsor-traced-act-pros?source=042719&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
The TRACED Act gives the FCC the authority to levy civil penalties against scammers, extends the window from one to three years to take action against intentional violators, and requires telephone providers to adopt call authentication technologies to verify that incoming calls are legitimate.

This bill already has overwhelming bipartisan support. But we need to show that the American people are behind ending the scourge of robocalls.

_**[Will you add your name and become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the TRACED Act and help stop robocall scammers?](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/citizen-co-sponsor-traced-act-pros?source=042719&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Thanks,

Ed

name: Carolyn Booker (Cory's mom)
subject: Cory's never been one to make a big fuss about his birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, Today is my son Cory's _50th_ birthday (That's something you can't even imagine saying when you're changing diapers)! As usual, he's making sure this day isn't all about him -- he's never been one to make a big fuss about himself. Today, he's in South Carolina hearing people's stories and ideas for this country. I know that's exactly how he wants to be celebrating his big day. But as his mom, I want to make sure he feels the love across the country on his birthday. [_**Will you take a second to sign his 50th birthday card? We 're sending the card to him tonight!**_](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76d7/5fca0d19/1d4071db/291acd07/4156530632/VEsH/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/happy-birthday?source=em_20190427") His team tells me they'll be showing him the names of all the people who've wished him a happy birthday, and I know it'll mean a lot to him to see yours. Thank you, Carolyn Booker [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc76d7/5fca0d19/1d4071db/291acd07/4156530632/VEsE/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/happy-birthday?source=em_20190427")

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Underdog
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
My story is a lot different than the other candidates'
| | | [](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9770cc/2ae112ef/6edb42e4/357c096f/1071334613/VEsH/ "https://kirstengillibrand.com/")
---
Peter, with just four days left in the month, I'm setting a new fundraising goal for us--and it's our most important one yet:
**We need to add 3,000 founding members to this campaign before April is over so I can get on the debate stage and we can stay on track to build the strongest campaign possible.[I want this to be a community-led effort to fight for what's right. No corporate PACs, no federal lobbyists, no super PAC. That means we're doing this together, and I hope I can count on you to make your first gift now to help us meet our April goal.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9770cc/2ae112ef/6edb42e4/357c096e/1071334613/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMzUtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3035-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9770cc/2ae112ef/6edb42e4/357c096e/1071334613/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMwMzUtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3035-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
My story is a lot different than the other candidates. I didn't get into this race expecting to coast, because I've always been discounted--and I've always been an underdog.
In fact, in my first House race, I ran in a two-to-one Republican district. The only person who thought I could win was my mother, and that is not a joke.
I won that race, and when I ran again, I won by 24 points.
So if I've learned one thing, it's that this is a marathon, not a sprint. I'm not concerned about a poll today. I'm concerned about the voters I'm talking to every day and the challenges they face.
What they need is a president who is bold and brave, who will fight for them--especially when it's hard.
Some people may be counting me out right now. But I have you--I have this community, coming together to help me run a bold, brave campaign and prove them wrong yet again. And that starts with hitting our April end-of-month goal.
**Make your first donation right now to become a founding member of our campaign --and help hit our goal of adding 3,000 new members before the end of the month to keep me on track to get on the debate stage.**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Excited to see what you have to say!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
Over the past two weeks, I've been traveling all around VA-07 during our "district weeks" and holding town hall events in Louisa and Henrico Counties.
| | Hi Peter,

Over the past two weeks, I've been traveling all around VA-07 during our "district weeks" and holding town hall events in Louisa and Henrico Counties. The time I get to spend back home during these periods is indispensable, because it gives me the chance to have face-to-face conversations with members of this community.

These conversations let me know what issues I should be prioritizing in Congress and help me better understand how I can serve Central Virginia families -- so it's incredibly encouraging that so many people show up to make their voices heard.

But, I understand that carving time out of your busy schedule to attend a town hall is a sacrifice. So, I created a two-question survey to give everyone the chance to share their priorities directly with me.

[**Your input matters to me, Peter. Will you take just 30 seconds to let me know what issues are most important to you? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tUm3q7u8s_md9W0WNh0rRvWZ2MAQ4qzeLdGdbwBdxls=/lpnh45rZvfVIowwo30gtjxRTWhQ3_vTXPDoJRYdZIgg=) | [BEGIN SURVEY »](https://act.myngp.com/el/tUm3q7u8s_md9W0WNh0rRvWZ2MAQ4qzeLdGdbwBdxls=/lpnh45rZvfVIowwo30gtjxRTWhQ3_vTXPDoJRYdZIgg=)
---
Fostering open and inclusive discourse was a centerpiece of our campaign -- and it's so important to me that I mirror that transparency as your representative. At the end of the day, listening to your priorities and fleshing out a plan to tackle them is what public service is all about.

[**I 'm excited to see what you have to say! Please, click here to begin our campaign's brief priorities survey. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tUm3q7u8s_md9W0WNh0rRvWZ2MAQ4qzeLdGdbwBdxls=/lpnh45rZvfVIowwo30gtjxRTWhQ3_vTXPDoJRYdZIgg=)

_\-- Abigail_

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Join me this Summer on a Baltic adventure!
body:
| | You’re invited to the Baltics
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FB6clUdS6lpIFIKWvxyXp9e2cOQvzJtyDDTF_AeDLkTIA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190427com01&n=1)
| Peter, I want to extend an invitation to you to join me on an unforgettable trip to the Baltics, August 9 to August 17, 2019! After many years of the Israel Experiences and our most recent trip the Mediterranean Experience cruise, we are bringing you another phenomenal cruise, the Baltic Experience! This all-inclusive cruise will feature some of the most beautiful places in the Baltic Sea, and we will get to travel to and absorb these destinations aboard a luxury cruise ship from the Azamara Cruise line. Join me along with Senator Rick Santorum, Conservative Radio Host Dan Celia, Brian White, and Karyn Williams as we cruise the Baltics together! We will visit Stockholm and Visby Sweden, Talinn Estonia, St. Petersburg Russia, Helsinki Finland, and Copenhagen Denmark! If you have traveled with us before, you already know that all-inclusive means exactly that and there are no surprises along the way. The Baltic Experience will be no different. And when the weather is often unbearably hot throughout most of the US in August, we will be enjoying the cool and delightful weather that makes travel in the Baltic region perfect. Once again we have the entire ship and will fill our time on board with spectacular entertainment and special guests. In addition to the cruise, we have multiple pre and post cruise offerings you can choose from to extend your trip. Our last cruise sold out in record time, so we encourage you to get your cabin secured soon. You can learn more about the exciting trip, including all the cruise details and rate information [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FB6clUdS6lpIFIKWvxyXp9e2cOQvzJtyDDTF_AeDLkTIA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190427com01&n=2). If you have additional questions about the trip after visiting the website you can contact the Baltic Experience team [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FBgEtmL7MM07_M1G-_cBmCG&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190427com01&n=3). [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9S_H0X-LMKxuVQZOVdM48FB6clUdS6lpIFIKWvxyXp9e2cOQvzJtyDDTF_AeDLkTIA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190427com01&n=4) We work tirelessly and do everything in our control to bring you “The Greatest Trip.” We would love to see you on board! **United. We Stand.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"The U.S. economy started 2019 with a pop," Harriet Torry reports. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=855cbb36ee&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [U.S. Economy Grew at 3.2% Rate in First Quarter](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=86a35c76ea&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“The U.S. economy started 2019 with a pop,” Harriet Torry reports. America’s economy “rose at a 3.2% annual rate from January through March, the strongest rate of first-quarter growth in four years.” A “blowout number” is how White House National Economic Council Director Larry Kudlow described it.

**By the numbers:** [2019 starts off with a bang](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e4820b8f7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Trump in Atlanta Vows to Fight Opioid Abuse Epidemic](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f541ada25f&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Atlanta Journal-Constitution_
President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump addressed thousands of addiction experts, counselors, and law-enforcement officers at the Rx Drug Abuse & Heroin Summit in Atlanta this week. In addition to discussing the need for border security to cut off the illicit drug supply, the President also made clear that no bad actors would be off the hook. “We are holding Big Pharma accountable,” he said to applause.

🎬 **Watch:** [President Trump and the First Lady take on the opioid crisis](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dd414dd65e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [White House Easter Egg Roll Rolls on for 141st Year](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12025d96b4&e=3ee4985eea)
-_USA Today_
“The 141st White House Easter Egg Roll – and first lady Melania Trump's third – got underway on the South Lawn Monday,” Maria Puente writes. “The main event is the spectacle of children rolling hard-boiled eggs across the lawn, but the first lady introduced two new additions to the festivities: musical eggs and a game of hopscotch named for her ‘Be Best’ initiative to improve the well-being of American children.”

**Something to share:** [The First Lady hosts the 2019 Easter Egg Roll](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=10a0689233&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Jared Kushner: Fifteen Lessons I Learned From Criminal-Justice Reform](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=998125a32b&e=3ee4985eea)
-_TIME_
“One of the proudest moments of my life was standing beside President Donald J. Trump in the Oval Office to witness him sign the First Step Act, a historic criminal-justice reform bill that would make American communities safer, improve hundreds of thousands of lives and change the way we think about prisons,” Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner writes.
---
|
---
| [Vice President Mike Pence: New Trade Agreement Puts Auto Industry First](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf7c8f9e76&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Detroit News_
“From the earliest days of our administration, President Donald J. Trump has pledged to pursue ‘a new future of American automotive leadership,’” Vice President Mike Pence writes. “But to secure American leadership in the auto industry well into the 21st century, we need to make sure American autoworkers compete on a level playing field. That begins by forging free, fair and reciprocal trade deals that put American workers and American jobs first — and we can start by passing the United States–Mexico–Canada Agreement into law.”
---
|
---
| [Border Patrol Says Apprehensions in the Rio Grande Valley Have Already Surpassed All of 2018](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e0486eed78&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Texas Tribune_
“Less than seven months into the fiscal year, the number of undocumented immigrants who have been apprehended or turned themselves in to U.S. Border Patrol agents in the Rio Grande Valley has already surpassed last year’s total,” Julian Aguilar reports. “The increase is the result of an ongoing surge of migrants, most of them from Central America, who are crossing the border to seek asylum.”
---
|
---
| [A Goal for Iran’s Oil Exports: Zero](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ffd7b7e190&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“President Trump wants to exert ‘maximum pressure’ on Iran, which is why he is giving the sanctions screws another firm twist. Any country that imports Iranian oil will soon face U.S. penalties—with no exceptions,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes. “The Trump Administration, to its credit, shows no signs of backing down. If Iran wants sanctions eased, it can stop spreading terror and renegotiate the nuclear deal.”
---
|
---
| [Why It Matters that Lockheed Martin is Set to Launch Production of F-16s in Greenville](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=416c75a93e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The_ _Greenville News_
“As Lockheed Martin readies production of the F-16 at its new home in Greenville, unexpectedly high demand for the fighter jet has officials saying up to 400 people will be hired for the work,” Anna Mitchell reports. “When we are able to do a ribbon cutting like this, it means great jobs, great wages for this community, but it also strengthens our alliances around the world,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro said.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3a2c182fa&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=066acd6935&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=492abe1744)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

Peter, I wanted to introduce myself. I'm Greg Schultz, and I'm Joe Biden's campaign manager.

This has been an exciting week! The response to our campaign has been amazing. I wanted to thank you for being on the team and making this campaign possible.

Together, we raised the highest Day One total of any candidate in the field. We showed that there is grassroots excitement for Joe Biden and a place for him in this race to offer ideas, policies, and a plan to restore the soul of America.

**Here 's the good news:** _Voters know Joe Biden._ They know he will fight for the middle-class and working folks. They know he has taken on the NRA -- twice -- and won. They know he will bring climate change to the forefront of the conversation. And they know that he is a leader that is respected on the world stage.

**But here 's what we're up against: **There are a lot of candidates in the field, and with a crowded field we need to be on the ground and online talking directly to voters about the issues they care about.

And to do that, we need to raise $1,200,000 more before our April 30 fundraising deadline, which is why I am writing to you today.

**Will you chip in to invest in our plan to build a strong grassroots operation in states across the country? Click the buttons below to make a donation:**

If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319b18/1cd0ac28/4a27a119/356bc5c9/3876439667/VEsHAA/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-email"). We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

clean_body: | "" | | "" | | "" Peter, I wanted to introduce myself. I'm Greg Schultz, and I'm Joe Biden's campaign manager. This has been an exciting week! The response to our campaign has been amazing. I wanted to thank you for being on the team and making this campaign possible. Together, we raised the highest Day One total of any candidate in the field. We showed that there is grassroots excitement for Joe Biden and a place for him in this race to offer ideas, policies, and a plan to restore the soul of America. Here 's the good news: Voters know Joe Biden. They know he will fight for the middle-class and working folks. They know he has taken on the NRA -- twice -- and won. They know he will bring climate change to the forefront of the conversation. And they know that he is a leader that is respected on the world stage. But here 's what we're up against: There are a lot of candidates in the field, and with a crowded field we need to be on the ground and online talking directly to voters about the issues they care about. And to do that, we need to raise $1,200,000 more before our April 30 fundraising deadline, which is why I am writing to you today. Will you chip in to invest in our plan to build a strong grassroots operation in states across the country? Click the buttons below to make a donation: | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Joe is not taking anything for granted in this election. The donations we receive in April will go towards hiring staff in early states and making sure that we can catch up with programs that have been building for months. He wants to build a program that wins by talking to every last voter and having as many personal conversations as he can. We're not relying on his name alone. So Peter, in order to build this kind of program we need all of our supporters from the very beginning. "" "" Thanks for reading. More to come. Greg Greg Schultz Campaign Manager Biden for President

---
A lot of billionaires, lobbyists, and CEOs love this time of year.

Leading up to big fundraising deadlines in presidential campaigns (like the one we're up against in a few days), they get showered with special attention from candidates.

Personal phone calls. Exclusive cocktail receptions. Small talk, thank yous, and promises to look into this or that tax loophole that might help them out.

But that's not Elizabeth's style. She's grateful for _everyone 's_ support, whether they can chip in $3 or $30 or $300. She doesn't make special phone calls to big donors or host any private fundraisers for them.

**Every supporter is an equal member of our team. No matter how much you can afford to contribute, you just might get a call from Elizabeth to say thank you.

[Can you make a contribution to help make sure our campaign can hit this April fundraising goal without relying on the big money that corrupts Washington?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852feda/45c30650/89172bf4/6697885b/1255314597/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZW9tIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiIyMDE5MDQyN2VtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19eom?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190427em1-full")**

She talks the talk with bold plans for big, structural change.

And she walks the walk by not selling her time to wealthy donors or taking any money from federally registered lobbyists, corporate PACs, or PACs of any kind.

**Our democracy is not for sale, and she 's running to be the best president money can't buy.**

But that makes grassroots supporters like you even more critical to the success of our campaign. You have the power to fuel Elizabeth's big ideas and fight to make them happen.

subject: I need your help
body:
This can change the world. | | |
# I need your help.
---
| | My name is David Oks, and I'm managing the Gravel 2020 campaign. A little about me: I'm a senior in high school. My family is Argentine-American, and I was raised by a single mother, a social worker. I see myself as a leftist in the vein of John Dewey, John Rawls, and Richard Rorty.

This campaign has the potential to change this country. Bringing Sen. Gravel to the debate stage would bring new, radical ideas to public attention. It would provide cover for the anti-war leftists in the field. And it would allow Sen. Gravel to say what the other leftist candidates, burdened by a desire to remain "electable," are unwilling to say.

[Donate just $1.00](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=0b7d52c199&e=85f7472d66)

Right now, we've hit a third of the donors we need to get to 65,000 and qualify for the debates. Our movement is doing well; in the new Emerson poll, we beat Kirsten Gillibrand! But we need to get Mike to the debates. This is an opportunity—a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity—to change this country.

**If each of you were to just get three people you know to donate, we'd qualify today.**

Here is what I ask: get 10 people you know to throw in a dollar. I know, I know, it might be weird asking your spouse or partner to donate. But we're trying to change the world. We're trying to save this country. We need you to do everything you can to help get us 65,000 unique donors.

Here are a few things you can do:
1. Forward this email to 25 people you know.
2. Get your partner to donate $1.
3. Get your parents to donate $1.
4. Talk to your friends about donating $1. Be an evangelist.

I really am eternally grateful for this. Let me know if you're ever visiting Ardsley, NY; and if you'd like to speak to me about anything, just email [david@mikegravel.org](mailto:david@mikegravel.org?subject=Hi%20David) and I'll get back to you shortly. Please, please do this: I beg it of you.

David Oks

[Donate just $1.00](https://mikegravel.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=d1dfd76932&e=85f7472d66)

Growing up on the West Side of San Antonio, my family never had it easy.

The odds were stacked against us from the start.

My grandmother immigrated to this country as an orphan when she was 7. She cleaned houses to provide for us.

**She never could have imagined her grandson would one day run for President -- but that 's the American Dream for you. **

More than anything, I want to reach that debate stage for my grandmother -- and for every struggling American who doesn't think they have anyone speaking for them.

Before my critical End of Month Deadline in 72 hours, will you chip in $15 to help me reach the debate stage?
